question: What is the color of the location arrow icon displayed on the map application screen? A. Green B. Blue C. Black D. White

What color is the t-shirt worn by the man speaking in the video? A. Black B. White C. Grey D. Green
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A hand holds a black smartphone displaying a map application with a blue location arrow. A black Samsung Exynos 7 processor chip stands upright next to a green circuit board with silver solder balls. A man wearing round wire-rimmed glasses and a grey t-shirt speaks while gesturing with his right hand. Digital map interfaces overlay the scene showing road lines and green park areas. Korean subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen.

question: How many GPS devices are displayed in the row behind the person?

Man with short black hair, round wire-rimmed glasses, wearing a dark grey t-shirt D. Digital map interface with a dark grey background
